title: Onedb Smartsuite — Anybuild
description: Onedb Smartsuite unifies ERP and CRM on one model-driven system with shared data, automation, and extensible business capabilities.

hero.headlineHtml:
Unified ERP and CRM
for operating systems
hero.copyHtml:
Run ERP and CRM on one model-driven foundation.
Share entities across front and back office, automate workflows, and extend safely over time.

businessSystem.title: Business Operating System
businessSystem.copyHtml:
Onedb Smartsuite seamlessly combines ERP and CRM into a single application and database.
Sharing entities between front and back office brings consistency, accuracy, speed, and ease of use.
Anybuild can reuse the same entities as a foundation for integrated line-of-business applications.
businessSystem.visualCopy: One model for transactions, customers, products, and workflows across operations.

items.title: ERP
items.copy: Accounting, logistics, billing, purchasing, projects, inventory, cash, assets, HR, tax, reporting, and analytics.

items.title: CRM
items.copy: Sales automation, service cases, marketing campaigns, dashboards, AI-assisted data capture, and forecasting.

summary.title: Business Operating System
summary.copyHtml:
Onedb ERP helps run operations more effectively and efficiently.
It reduces compliance burden, improves visibility, and supports proactive decision making through real-time monitoring.
summary.visualCopy: One flow for finance, operations, and fulfillment.

featureCards.title: Information is Power
featureCards.copy: Real-time P&L, balance sheet, cashflow, proactive exception reporting, and alerts.

featureCards.title: One Database
featureCards.copy: Single source of truth with seamlessly integrated CRM for consistency, accuracy, and efficiency.

featureCards.title: SAP, Oracle, Dynamics...
featureCards.copy: Avoid rigid process constraints. Onedb adapts to your way of working.

featureCards.title: Easy to customize
featureCards.copy: Extend rapidly with unique capabilities that create competitive advantage.

featureCards.title: Process Automation
featureCards.copy: Automate recurring billing, timesheets, and workflow-driven operations.

featureCards.title: Linked Transactions
featureCards.copy: Automatic flow from quote to order to invoice to cash without rekeying.

featureCards.title: AI Components
featureCards.copy: AI-assisted OCR data capture and automation for faster execution.

featureCards.title: Comprehensive Capability
featureCards.copy: SOP, POP, BOM, inventory, RM, PM, GL, BR, HR, projects, assets, and more.

featureCards.title: Business Intelligence
featureCards.copy: Powerful reporting, analytics, graphical report design, and SQL mode.

featureCards.title: Deep Integrations
featureCards.copy: Connect external data sources, API tools, and AI MCP services.

generalLedger.title: Advanced General Ledger
generalLedger.copyHtml:
At the heart of Onedb ERP is an advanced general ledger for statutory and consolidated multi-currency accounts.
Use multi-dimensional analysis, real-time trial balance, automated future postings, and full audit trail with drill-down to source transactions.

operations.title: Operations Support
operations.copyHtml:
Support service, distribution, and manufacturing with accurate tracking, billing, costing, and cashflow optimization.
Automated statements, reminders, reconciliations, forecasts, alerts, and exception reports help maintain control and margins.

items.name: Parties
items.copy: Organizations, people, contacts, and org charts.

items.name: Items
items.copy: Line items, products, goods, services, expenses, and categories.

items.name: POP
items.copy: Purchase orders, invoices, matching, and GRNs.

items.name: SOP
items.copy: Sales quotes, orders, invoices, matching, and price lists.

items.name: AR
items.copy: Accounts receivable, customers, and cash reconciliations.

items.name: AP
items.copy: Accounts payable, suppliers, and cash reconciliations.

items.name: Cash
items.copy: Statements, receipts, payments, and reconciliations.

items.name: Inventory
items.copy: Stock management, warehouses, BOMs, and FIFO costing.

items.name: GL
items.copy: General ledger, multi-currency, multi-dimensional, and drill-down.

items.name: Budgets
items.copy: Unlimited budgets, forecasts, and variance reporting.

items.name: Projects
items.copy: Stages, tasks, revenue recognition, and project accounting.

items.name: Jobs
items.copy: Job costing and project accounting.

items.name: Timesheets
items.copy: Time recording for billing and operations.

items.name: RB
items.copy: Recurring billing, subscriptions, and linked timesheets.

items.name: HR
items.copy: Payroll, absences, recruitment, onboarding, and reviews.

items.name: Analytics
items.copy: User-defined dimensions, categories, tags, and business units.

items.name: BI
items.copy: Graphical reports, function/view designer, and optional SQL.

items.name: Workflows
items.copy: Standard approvals plus unlimited user-defined workflows.

items.name: Security
items.copy: Flexible user context by company with granular row-level security.

partOne.title: Find and Nurture Opportunities
partOne.copyHtml:
Leads and opportunities are precious. Onedb CRM helps uncover, nurture, progress, and close them.
Leads to prospects to customers. Opportunities to deals to invoices. Automated sales workflows keep momentum.
AI and BI for sales intelligence helps discover patterns, monitor performance, and trigger alerts.
partOne.visualCopy: Convert opportunities and build long-term customer loyalty with connected workflows.

featureCards.title: Information is Power
featureCards.copy: Real-time P&L, balance sheet, cashflow, proactive exception reporting, and alerts.

featureCards.title: One Database
featureCards.copy: One source of truth with integrated CRM for consistency, accuracy, and efficiency.

featureCards.title: Salesforce, Hubspot, Dynamics...
featureCards.copy: Avoid imposed processes. Onedb adapts to your own way of working.

featureCards.title: Easy to customize
featureCards.copy: Extend CRM with unique capabilities to gain competitive edge.

featureCards.title: Process Automation
featureCards.copy: Automate service workflows, recurring billing, and case assignments.

featureCards.title: Linked Transactions
featureCards.copy: Automatic flow from quote to order to invoice to cash.

featureCards.title: AI Data Capture
featureCards.copy: Capture data from meetings and notes, generate proposals, and update calendar or email actions.

featureCards.title: Comprehensive Capability
featureCards.copy: Sales automation, service case handling, and marketing campaign management.

featureCards.title: Superior Business Intelligence
featureCards.copy: Powerful analytics, report design, and SQL-enabled views.

featureCards.title: Integrations
featureCards.copy: Email, chat, calendars, MS Office, Google Docs, WhatsApp, and API tools.

sectionCta.title: Build with Onedb Smartsuite
sectionCta.copyHtml: Run ERP and CRM on a shared platform model, automate operations, and extend safely as your business evolves.
